title: T-020 — Pack + Ship Server Actions: closeBox, confirmShipment, reprintSscc, carrierUpsert (11-shipping-e)
prompt:
# T-020 — Pack/Ship Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §6 D-SHP-13, §6 D-SHP-14 D365 SalesOrder Confirm Push, §8.4 Flow Pack + SSCC + BOL, §11 V-SHIP-PACK-01..05, V-SHIP-SHIP-01..06
Prototype refs: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:577-607 (pack_close_carton_modal), :609-700 (ship_confirm_modal), :702-739 (sscc_preview_reprint_modal), :792-807 (carrier_create_edit_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for pack station + shipment confirm with strict V-SHIP-SHIP-* enforcement and atomic outbox enqueue.

## GS1 prefix source
All SSCC generation reads `organizations.gs1_company_prefix` from the organizations table (02-settings). Do not hardcode or store in environment config — always read from DB.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/pack-ship.ts` exports:
   - `closeBox({ shipmentId, boxNumber, actual_weight_kg, contents[] })` — V-SHIP-PACK-01 (≥1 content row), V-SHIP-PACK-04 (actual_weight_kg within product.variance_tolerance_pct from products NPD); calls `generateSsccForBox` (T-019) so sscc is assigned atomically; outbox `shipping.box.closed`. Permission `ship.pack.close`.
   - `confirmShipment({ shipmentId })` — runs all V-SHIP-SHIP-* in tx: V-SHIP-SHIP-01 (all boxes have sscc), V-SHIP-SHIP-02 (BOL generated — check bol_pdf_url IS NOT NULL), V-SHIP-SHIP-03 (no critical quality_holds across all box LPs — call T-013 evaluateLpForShipping per LP), V-SHIP-SHIP-04 (outbox enqueue in same tx — atomic D-SHP-14), V-SHIP-SHIP-05 (LP state reserved→shipped atomic via 05-WH). Then UPDATE shipments.status='shipped', shipped_at, shipped_by; UPDATE sales_orders.status='shipped' if all lines fully shipped; outbox `shipment.confirmed` per §12.1 payload schema (D365 dispatch consumer is T-029). Permission `ship.ship.confirm`.
   - `reprintSscc({ ssccId, reason })` — delegates to T-019 reprintSscc; audit; outbox.
   - `upsertCarrier({ carrier })` — carriers table (created by T-027). Permission `ship.so.create` (carriers admin OR shipping_manager).
2. Atomic outbox: `shipment.confirmed` event MUST be enqueued in the same DB transaction as the `shipments.status='shipped'` UPDATE (V-SHIP-SHIP-04, D-SHP-14 R14 idempotency `ship::<shipment_id>::v<version>` key).
3. Quality hold check loops through all shipment_box_contents.license_plate_id → calls T-013 evaluateLpForShipping; any `critical` returns `blocker_code='qa.critical_hold'` and aborts.
4. All mutations under `withOrgContext`. PII redact. Rate-limit 30/min/user.
5. On `confirmShipment` success: invoke 05-WH `transition_lp(lpId, 'shipped')` for each LP atomically (consumer of 05-WH T-013 LP DSL).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/pack-ship.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/server-actions/shipping/__tests__/pack-ship.test.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/shipping.ts [modify — ShippingBoxClosed, ShipmentConfirmed (D365 payload schema per §12.1)]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given closeBox is called for a box with 0 contents, when validator runs, then throws V-SHIP-PACK-01 and no DB write.
2. Given closeBox is called with actual_weight_kg outside product.variance_tolerance_pct, when validator runs, then throws V-SHIP-PACK-04 and no DB write.
3. Given confirmShipment is called for a shipment whose 1+ box LPs has critical quality_hold (T-013 returns ok=false), when it runs, then throws blocker_code='qa.critical_hold' (V-SHIP-SHIP-03) and no state change.
4. Given confirmShipment succeeds, when DB is inspected post-call, then: shipments.status='shipped', shipping_outbox_events row with event_type='shipment.confirmed', idempotency_key='ship::<id>::v1', payload schema matching §12.1, and 05-WH license_plates.status='shipped' for all box LPs — all in same tx.
5. Given confirmShipment is called twice for the same shipmentId, when the second call runs, then the outbox idempotency_key collision triggers a no-op replay (returns same response, no double-enqueue) per R14.
6. Given grep current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') on pack-ship.ts, when run, then zero matches.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres asserting AC 1-6 + atomic-tx assertions (rollback on failure).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run pack-ship.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not enqueue `shipment.confirmed` outbox event outside the DB transaction that UPDATEs status='shipped'.
- Do not skip T-013 quality-hold check.
- Do not bypass V-SHIP-PACK-04 catch-weight variance.
- Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
- Do not allow duplicate idempotency_key (R14 enforcement).
- Do not write directly to license_plates.status — call 05-WH transition_lp DSL.

## BRCGS audit trail
confirmShipment stores SHA-256 hash of the POD/signed-BOL document + retention_until = confirmed_at + 7 years (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5 / §14.4). Do not allow truncation or premature deletion.

pipeline_inputs.description: Pack closeBox + confirmShipment Server Actions enforcing V-SHIP-PACK-*/V-SHIP-SHIP-* and atomic outbox enqueue (D-SHP-14).
pipeline_inputs.details: Atomic outbox in same tx (V-SHIP-SHIP-04, R14 idempotency key). T-013 quality-hold gate (HARD BLOCK on critical). 05-WH transition_lp DSL invoked for shipped state. Catch-weight variance from product.variance_tolerance_pct (NPD/Technical).
out_of_scope: Do not implement BOL/packing slip generation (T-023).
cross_module_dependencies: 09-quality/T-064 (consume gate — confirmShipment calls holdsGuard before shipping LP; per 2026-05-14 audit)
acceptance_criteria: Given closeBox called for box with 0 contents, when validator runs, then throws V-SHIP-PACK-01; AND given actual_weight_kg outside product.variance_tolerance_pct, then throws V-SHIP-PACK-04.
Given confirmShipment with a critical-hold LP (v_active_holds via 09-quality T-064, holdsGuard called before mutation), when it runs, then throws blocker_code='qa.critical_hold' (V-SHIP-SHIP-03).

Given confirmShipment succeeds, when DB inspected, then shipments.status='shipped' + shipping_outbox_events row (event_type='shipping.shipment.confirmed') + SHA-256 hash stored + retention_until = now + 7 years (BRCGS §3.5); GS1 prefix read from organizations.gs1_company_prefix (02-settings).

Given confirmShipment called twice for same shipmentId, when second runs, then idempotency_key collision returns no-op response; AND grep current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') on pack-ship.ts returns zero matches.
test_strategy: RED: vitest with testcontainers Postgres asserting AC 1-6 + tx rollback on failure.
Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run pack-ship.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.
risk_red_lines: Do not enqueue shipment.confirmed outbox outside DB tx.
Do not skip T-013 quality-hold check.
Do not call mutations outside withOrgContext.
Do not write directly to license_plates.status — call 05-WH DSL.
D365 dispatcher is export-only — must not mutate canonical Monopilot state via D365 callback; R15 anti-corruption contract: Monopilot is the system of record.
POD audit trail uses SHA-256 hash + 7-year retention (BRCGS Issue 9 §3.5) — do not allow truncation or premature deletion of signed document records.
